title: Flip String to Monotone Increasing
hints: Consider the final monotone string as having a split point where 0s end and 1s begin. Where could this boundary be?
Use dynamic programming to track the minimum flips needed to maintain a valid prefix ending in 0 or ending in 1.
The state represents the cost to make the prefix valid, with the last character flipped to 0 or 1. Base case is the first character.
